compiled_state.title: Write tests verifying duplicates and supersedes round-trip through reducer and ticket deps output
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Context
The reducer in ticket_reducer/_processors.py line 103 already preserves any relation string via `data.get("relation", "")`. The llm_format.py shorten_dep function maps relation->r and will pass through any relation string. The _graph.py only counts blocks/depends_on as blockers. After c0a9-91dd's changes (allow duplicates/supersedes in ticket-link.sh + _graph.py cycle detection exemption), the reducer round-trip should work without code changes.

This task writes tests to verify the end-to-end behavior.

## Tests to write
Add to `tests/scripts/test-ticket-link-duplicates-supersedes.sh` OR create `tests/unit/test_reducer_duplicates_supersedes.py`.

### test_deps_output_includes_duplicates_relation
- Create ticket A with a LINK event (duplicates) pointing to B
- Run `ticket deps A`
- Assert JSON output has `deps` array containing entry with `relation: "duplicates"`
- Assert `blockers` array does NOT contain B
- Assert `ready_to_work: true` (not affected by non-blocking relation)

### test_deps_output_includes_supersedes_relation
- Same as above with supersedes relation

### test_show_llm_format_surfaces_duplicates_in_dp_array
- Create ticket A with duplicates LINK to B
- Run `ticket show --format=llm A`
- Assert output JSON has `dp` array with entry containing `r: "duplicates"` and `tid: B`

### test_reducer_unlink_cancels_duplicates_link
- Create A with duplicates LINK to B
- Write UNLINK event canceling the link (using link_uuid)
- Run `ticket deps A`
- Assert deps array does NOT contain the B relation (cancelled)

### test_ready_to_work_unaffected_by_duplicates
- Create A blocked by B (depends_on), and also A duplicates C
- Ensure ready_to_work=false (B is open blocker)
- Close B
- Assert ready_to_work=true
- The duplicates link to C plays no role in ready_to_work calculation

## Files to create/modify
- `tests/unit/test_reducer_duplicates_supersedes.py` or `tests/scripts/test-ticket-link-duplicates-supersedes.sh` extension

## Acceptance criteria
- All 5 tests pass after c0a9-91dd is merged (the reducer already handles any relation string)
- Tests may need to run after c0a9-91dd's changes are in place (ticket-link.sh allows the new relations)
- If any test fails, identify the specific component that needs fixing

## Testing mode
RED → GREEN — tests should pass after c0a9-91dd changes land; write as verification tests
